{{- define "main" }} {{- $weeks := slice }} {{- $articles := slice }} {{- range .Pages }} {{- if and .File (hasPrefix .File.BaseFileName "week") }} {{- $weeks = $weeks | append . }} {{- else }} {{- $articles = $articles | append . }} {{- end }} {{- end }}

{{- range sort $weeks "Title" "asc" }}

{{- end }}
